description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Pull request Windows build test that runs on push to winbuild-testing branch and on pull requests to master and release branches. Use a single windows-latest job that checks out the repository with submodules, sets up Ninja, downloads and installs GStreamer and its development package, caches and installs Qt 5.12.10, creates a build environment, sets up the Visual Studio shell, configures CMake with Ninja generator, and builds the project with the specified build type.
